title: uraria hamosa
intro: Uraria hamosa, also known as the kidney bean tree or madangui, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Uraria hamosa include treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other urinary problems, as well as reducing fever and alleviating rheumatism. Uraria hamosa is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
